summary: Backend (15/15 tests) and Frontend testing for User Management (super_admin) and Daily Sales features. All backend endpoints working: list/update users, role hierarchy auth gating, create/update/list/delete daily sales, today endpoint, staff names. Frontend: login as super_admin succeeds, sidebar correctly shows 'Daily Sales' + 'Users', /admin/users renders 28 customers with stats, search, and working role dropdowns (verified customer->staff persists). /admin/daily-sales renders both Entry + History tabs, locations populate, Add Staff row works, History filters function. One frontend issue observed: clicking 'Save Sales Data' did not display the success-message and the entry did not appear in History (filtered by location+date) - likely a race condition between selectedLocation->loadTodayEntry and form-fill, or a silent failure in handleSubmit.

ui_bugs.issue: After filling form (location, date 2026-02-10, sales fields, staff hours) and clicking 'Save Sales Data', success-message did not appear within 10s and the entry did not show up in History when filtered by same location+month. No alert/error was visible. Backend POST /api/admin/daily-sales works perfectly via direct API tests.

ROLE_CONFIG in admin-users/index.jsx only handles {customer, staff, admin}. If a customer document has role='super_admin' (rare but possible), the role badge falls back to 'Customer' label, and the role select dropdown has no super_admin option (correct - matches backend VALID_ROLES). Just a minor visual edge case.

integration_issues.issue: Possible race: setSelectedLocation triggers useEffect -> loadTodayEntry which can overwrite form fields if it resolves after user typing. Recommend gating loadTodayEntry to only run when entryDate equals today, or set saving guard.

action_items: Investigate why frontend Daily Sales save did not produce success-message (likely loadTodayEntry race condition overwriting fields, or silent error - add console.error in catch block of handleSubmit)
Consider gating useEffect [selectedLocation, entryDate] -> loadTodayEntry so it only loads when form is empty/unsaved
Optional: extend ROLE_CONFIG in admin-users/index.jsx to display 'Super Admin' badge for super_admin role
critical_code_review_comments: routes/users.py:35-49 - When promoting customer to staff/admin, generates a random temp_password but never returns/communicates it. Promoted users cannot log into admin panel because they have no known password. Recommend: return temp_password in response, or send via email, or require admin to set a password.
routes/users.py:57 - Demoting an admin/staff back to customer deletes their users_collection entry but does not preserve any audit trail. Consider soft-delete or audit log.

routes/sales.py:14-42 - create_or_update relies on (location_id, date) compound uniqueness but no DB-level unique index is enforced in code. If concurrent requests hit, race could create duplicates. Should ensure unique index exists at startup.

routes/sales.py - GET /staff-names returns customer names with role staff/admin AND ALL users in users_collection (no role filter on users_collection query at line 86-89). May leak names of users without admin/staff role.

AdminDailySales.jsx:43-45 - useEffect [selectedLocation, entryDate] loads today's entry but uses /today/{location_id} endpoint which always returns TODAY's data regardless of entryDate selected. So when user picks a past date, the form may be incorrectly populated from today's entry. Should use a date-specific GET (e.g., /api/admin/daily-sales?location_id=X&start_date=Y&end_date=Y) when entryDate != today.
AdminDailySales.jsx:139-141 - useEffect dependency missing isAdmin (eslint exhaustive-deps); fetchHistory only runs once on tab change but won't re-run if isAdmin updates.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created/cleaned up TEST_ daily-sales entries (deleted after run). One leftover entry may exist if the frontend save did succeed silently for date 2026-02-10 - main agent should verify and clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_users_and_sales.py pass. Frontend renders correctly and core flows (login, navigation, role change, history view) verified. Open issue: form save in /admin/daily-sales appeared not to persist via UI even though backend POST works directly - investigate loadTodayEntry race condition or check browser network tab during manual test. The /today/{location_id} endpoint design issue noted in code review is highest priority frontend-facing concern.
rca of the issue: Daily Sales form save UI failure RCA: When user selects location, useEffect [selectedLocation, entryDate] -> loadTodayEntry calls /today/{location_id} which returns today's record (using server-side datetime.now()) regardless of entryDate. If the response arrives after user has filled in fields, it overwrites them via setSales/setFloatAmount/setCashTaken/setCashTakenBy/setStaffHours. Then on submit, the original 'today' values get re-saved (or empty values if no today entry). Reproduction: 1) Select location, 2) Quickly change entryDate to past/future, 3) Fill fields - they may be reset by late-arriving loadTodayEntry response. Mitigation: Use a /api/admin/daily-sales/by-date/{location_id}/{date} endpoint, or include entryDate in the today query, or only run loadTodayEntry when entryDate === today's date.
